title: United Arab Emirates Corporate Tax Registration
description: Application to register for Corporate Tax (CT) and obtain a Tax Registration Number (TRN) with the UAE Federal Tax Authority (FTA), filed online through the EmaraTax digital tax services platform. Covers entity classification, country of registration/incorporation and date of incorporation, the applicant's Corporate Tax Period, main trade license and business activity details, ownership, the local branch gate, registered address and contact details, the authorized signatory, and the final review declaration. This is a distinct EmaraTax application from VAT Registration (modelled separately as ae/fta/vat-registration). Models the Legal Person registration pathway that the source manual documents field-by-field; the Natural Person pathway is selectable via entityType but its own (simpler) field set was not sourced in this version — see VERIFICATION.md. Does not model per-branch/per-owner repeating detail beyond the first entry (GovSchema v0.3 has no array field type). It does not submit the application; the live EmaraTax platform (eservices.tax.gov.ae) and the Federal Tax Authority are always authoritative.

source.documentRef: Corporate Tax Registration – Taxpayer User Manual, EmaraTax, Version 4.0.0.0, dated 17 May 2023

verification.notes: Source-derived reference schema authored field-by-field from the Federal Tax Authority's official 'Corporate Tax Registration – Taxpayer User Manual' (EmaraTax, v4.0.0.0, dated 17 May 2023), a 41-page screenshot-driven walkthrough of the live EmaraTax CT-registration wizard, downloaded directly from tax.gov.ae. Every field's label and its section membership were read directly off the manual's own EmaraTax UI screenshots (rendered from the PDF via pdfjs-dist + node-canvas, since the manual's extractable text layer is sparse step captions only). Picked up under this cycle's standing GovSchema Standard Research routine (GOV-1371) from the candidate the prior VAT Registration cycle (GOV-1335) explicitly flagged as a future sibling document. Status remains 'draft' pending an independent second reviewer's field-by-field pass; see the review-gate issue.

fields.name: entityType
fields.label: Entity Type
fields.description: The legal category and sub-type of the applicant, selected first because it determines which subsequent input fields the EmaraTax wizard displays. The 12 Legal Person values are read verbatim from the manual's own entity sub-type list (p.17). The three Natural Person values are asserted by direct analogy to the sibling ae/fta/vat-registration schema's confirmed Natural Person taxonomy on the same EmaraTax platform; only natural_person_partnership_or_heirs is independently confirmed for this specific document (p.22's trade-license carve-out list) — see VERIFICATION.md.
fields.sourceRef: FTA Corporate Tax Registration – Taxpayer User Manual (EmaraTax, v4.0.0.0, 17 May 2023) — p.16-17, Entity Details

fields.name: countryOfRegistrationOrIncorporation
fields.label: Country of Registration/Incorporation
fields.description: Not applicable for the Natural Person pathway, which this version does not otherwise model beyond entityType selection (see VERIFICATION.md).
fields.sourceRef: FTA Corporate Tax Registration – Taxpayer User Manual (EmaraTax, v4.0.0.0, 17 May 2023) — p.17, Entity Details

fields.name: dateOfIncorporation
fields.label: Date of Incorporation
fields.sourceRef: FTA Corporate Tax Registration – Taxpayer User Manual (EmaraTax, v4.0.0.0, 17 May 2023) — p.17, Entity Details

fields.name: corporateTaxPeriod
fields.label: Corporate Tax Period
fields.description: The applicant's 12-month Corporate Tax financial period (e.g. 'January - December' in the rendered example), selected from a dropdown. The manual does not enumerate the dropdown's full list of period options, so this is modelled as free text rather than a fabricated enum — see VERIFICATION.md.
fields.sourceRef: FTA Corporate Tax Registration – Taxpayer User Manual (EmaraTax, v4.0.0.0, 17 May 2023) — p.17, Entity Details

fields.name: tradeLicenseIssuingAuthority
fields.label: Trade License Issuing Authority
fields.description: The UAE mainland Emirate department or free-zone authority that issued the trade license. Not applicable for the entity types the source excludes (p.22): 'Natural Person - Partnership or Heir', 'Legal Person - Foreign Business' (interpreted here as covering both legal_person_foreign_company and legal_person_foreign_partnership — see VERIFICATION.md), 'Legal Person - Federal UAE Govt. Entity', and 'Legal Person - Emirate UAE Govt. Entity'.
fields.sourceRef: FTA Corporate Tax Registration – Taxpayer User Manual (EmaraTax, v4.0.0.0, 17 May 2023) — p.21-22, Main License Details

fields.name: businessActivityIndustry
fields.label: Industry
fields.description: The industry classification selected in the 'Business Activities' modal. The applicant may add multiple business activities; this and the following four fields model the first/primary one, per this registry's convention for repeating groups (GovSchema v0.3 has no array field type).
